name: Retina
description: Microsofts open-source eBPF-based network observability platform for Kubernetes with traffic flow visualization.

seo.title: Retina — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Retina: Microsofts open-source eBPF-based network observability platform for Kubernetes with traffic flow visualization.

when_to_use: eBPF-based network traffic visualization for Kubernetes
Pod-to-pod traffic flow monitoring without sidecar proxies
Detect network policy violations and connectivity issues
Open-source Kubernetes network observability from Microsoft

pros: Open-source from Microsoft with active development
eBPF-based, low overhead on K8s nodes
Traffic flow visualization for network debugging
cons: Still early vs Cilium Hubble maturity
Limited enterprise support vs commercial tools
review.verdict: Credible open alternative to Cilium Hubble, but Hubble has a head start and broader ecosystem.
review.best_for: Kubernetes network engineers wanting a vendor-neutral eBPF observability tool.
review.not_for: Teams already running Cilium with Hubble or needing polished commercial support.
